p.c: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { (x0.is_prime and x1.is_prime and x0 != x1 and lib(nat).nat_mod(x2 * x3, (x0 - 1) * (x1 - 1)) = 1) = is_rsa_key(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(p, q, e, d)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { k0 * ((p - 1) * (q - 1)) + lib(nat).nat_mod(e * d)((p - 1) * (q - 1)) = e * d }

p.c: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(q - 1, p - 1)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }(k, q - 1, p - 1)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }(k, p - 1, q - 1)
p.is_prime and e * d = k * ((p - 1) * (q - 1)) + 1
p.is_prime and e * d = k * ((p - 1) * (q - 1)) + 1
p.is_prime
not rsa_pow_mod_p(p, q, e, d, m, k)
not m.pow(e * d).congr_mod(m, p)
k * ((p - 1) * (q - 1)) + 1 != e * d or not p.is_prime or m.pow(e * d).congr_mod(m, p)
p.is_prime and e * d = k * ((p - 1) * (q - 1)) + 1
p.is_prime
q.is_prime and e * d = k * ((p - 1) * (q - 1)) + 1
q.is_prime and e * d = k * ((p - 1) * (q - 1)) + 1
q.is_prime
not rsa_pow_mod_q(p, q, e, d, m, k)
not m.pow(e * d).congr_mod(m, q)
k * ((p - 1) * (q - 1)) + 1 != e * d or not q.is_prime or m.pow(e * d).congr_mod(m, q)
q.is_prime and e * d = k * ((p - 1) * (q - 1)) + 1
q.is_prime
not is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) or (p.is_prime and q.is_prime and p != q and lib(nat).nat_mod(e * d, (p - 1) * (q - 1)) = 1)
not is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) or (p.is_prime and q.is_prime and p != q)
not is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) or (p.is_prime and q.is_prime)
not is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) or p.is_prime
not is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) or (p.is_prime and q.is_prime and p != q and lib(nat).nat_mod(e * d, (p - 1) * (q - 1)) = 1)
not is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) or (p.is_prime and q.is_prime and p != q)
not is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) or (p.is_prime and q.is_prime)
not is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) or q.is_prime
q = p
not is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) or (p.is_prime and q.is_prime and p != q and lib(nat).nat_mod(e * d, (p - 1) * (q - 1)) = 1)
not is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) or (p.is_prime and q.is_prime and p != q)
not is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) or q != p
not is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) or (p.is_prime and q.is_prime and p != q and lib(nat).nat_mod(e * d, (p - 1) * (q - 1)) = 1)
not is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) or lib(nat).nat_mod(e * d, (p - 1) * (q - 1)) = 1
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(nat).nat_mod(x0, x1) = lib(nat).nat_mod(x2, x1) = x0.congr_mod(x2, x1) }(lib(nat).nat_mod(m.pow(e), n).pow(d), n, m.pow(e * d))
lib(nat).nat_mod(lib(nat).nat_mod(m.pow(e), n).pow(d), n) != lib(nat).nat_mod(m.pow(e * d), n) or lib(nat).nat_mod(m.pow(e), n).pow(d).congr_mod(m.pow(e * d), n)
lib(nat).nat_mod(m.pow(e), n).pow(d) != m.pow(e * d) or lib(nat).nat_mod(m.pow(e), n).pow(d).congr_mod(m.pow(e * d), n)
not lib(nat).nat_mod(m.pow(e), n).pow(d).congr_mod(m.pow(e * d), n) or lib(nat).nat_mod(lib(nat).nat_mod(m.pow(e), n).pow(d), n) = lib(nat).nat_mod(m.pow(e * d), n)

goal: rsa_decrypt(rsa_encrypt(m, e, p * q), d, p * q) = lib(nat).nat_mod(lib(nat).nat_mod(m.pow(e))(p * q).pow(d))(p * q)

p.c: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(nat).nat_mod(x0.pow(x1), x2) = rsa_decrypt(x0, x1, x2) }(rsa_encrypt(m, e, p * q), d, p * q)
(forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { lib(nat).nat_mod(x0.pow(x1)) = rsa_decrypt(x0, x1) })
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(nat).nat_mod(x0.pow(x1), x2) = rsa_encrypt(x0, x1, x2) }(m, e, p * q)
is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) and m < p * q
is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(nat).nat_mod(x0, x1) = lib(nat).nat_mod(x2, x1) = x0.congr_mod(x2, x1) }(m.pow(e * d), p * q, m)
lib(nat).nat_mod(m.pow(e * d), p * q) != lib(nat).nat_mod(m, p * q) or m.pow(e * d).congr_mod(m, p * q)
m.pow(e * d) != m or m.pow(e * d).congr_mod(m, p * q)
not m.pow(e * d).congr_mod(m, p * q) or lib(nat).nat_mod(m.pow(e * d), p * q) = lib(nat).nat_mod(m, p * q)
is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) and m < p * q
m < p * q

goal: rsa_decrypt(rsa_encrypt(m, e, p * q), d, p * q) = m

p.c: not rsa_correctness(p, q, e, d, m)
rsa_decrypt(rsa_encrypt(m, e, p * q), d, p * q) != m
not m < p * q or not is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) or rsa_decrypt(rsa_encrypt(m, e, p * q), d, p * q) = m
is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d) and m < p * q
m < p * q
is_rsa_key(p, q, e, d)
